scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web "corepack pnpm dev:api" "corepack pnpm dev:web"
scripts.format:check: corepack pnpm --filter web format:check && ".venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m ruff format --check apps/api
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter web lint && ".venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m ruff check apps/api
scripts.test: ".venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m pytest apps/api/tests -v && corepack pnpm --filter web test --run
scripts.typecheck: ".venv\Scripts\python.exe" -m mypy apps/api/app && corepack pnpm --filter web typecheck
